stores.name: Brim Hemel Hempstead
stores.address: Lawn Lane, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Aisha K.
reviews.text: Proper smash burgers in Hemel at last. Crispy lacy edges, melty cheese, and the brim sauce is unreal. Strictly Halal too — we'll be back.

reviews.author: Tom B.
reviews.text: Great patties and the loaded fries are a meal on their own. Gets busy on weekends so go early, but worth the wait.

stores.name: Brim Luton
stores.address: 32 Kimpton Rd, Luton, LU2 0SX, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Bilal A.
reviews.text: Best burger in Luton hands down. Smashed thin, deeply caramelised, 100% Halal. The shakes are thick too.

reviews.author: Sara M.
reviews.text: Kimpton Rd needed this. Fast service, friendly staff, and the double is a proper feed.

stores.name: Brim Stratford
stores.address: Westfield Stratford City, London E20 1EJ, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Leah R.
reviews.text: Perfect stop after shopping at Westfield. Juicy, messy, exactly what a smash burger should be.

reviews.author: Imran S.
reviews.text: Solid burgers and quick service even when the mall is packed. The loaded fries are the move.

stores.name: Brim High Barnet
stores.address: 119 High Street, Barnet, London EN5 5UZ, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Hannah W.
reviews.text: Barnet high street finally has a proper smash spot. Crispy lacy edges and that sauce — dangerously good.

reviews.author: Yusuf A.
reviews.text: Halal, never frozen, and you can taste it. Staff were lovely with the kids too.

stores.name: Brim Dalston
stores.address: 517 Kingsland Rd, London E8 4AR, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.text: Kingsland Rd gem. The double with brim sauce is elite. Shakes thick enough to stand a straw in.

reviews.author: Marcus L.
reviews.text: Great flavour and proper portions. Only knocked a star as seating is tight at peak.

stores.name: Brim Hammersmith
stores.address: 130 King St, London W6 0QU, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Zainab H.
reviews.text: King St's best new opening. Smashed to order, screaming hot, and properly Halal. Loved it.

reviews.author: Daniel O.
reviews.text: Crispy edges, soft bun, loaded fries done right. Fast and friendly.

stores.name: Brim Kentish Town
stores.address: JML House, Regis Rd, London NW5 3EW, United Kingdom

reviews.author: Aleena F.
reviews.text: Regis Rd hidden gem. Big juicy burgers exactly as advertised. The chicken is criminally underrated.

reviews.author: Sam P.
reviews.text: Really good smash burger and a clean spot. Parking is tight but the food makes up for it.

reviews.author: Hamza S.
reviews.text: My new go-to in Colchester. Patty-to-bun ratio is spot on and the shakes are thick. Open late too.

reviews.author: Ellie T.
reviews.text: Finally proper Halal smash burgers in Essex. Friendly staff and quick service.

stores.name: Brim Gulberg
stores.placeQuery: Brim Burgers Main Boulevard Gulberg Lahore

reviews.author: Zara H.
reviews.text: Main Boulevard needed this. Perfectly smashed patties, melty cheese, and a sauce I'd buy by the bottle.

reviews.author: Usman T.
reviews.text: Brought friends from out of town and they were blown away. Fast service, spotless place, and 100% Halal.

stores.name: Brim Mall One
stores.address: Shop 12, Ground Floor, Mall 1, Main Blvd Gulberg, Block D1, Gulberg III, Lahore, Pakistan
stores.placeQuery: Brim Burgers Mall 1 Gulberg III Lahore

reviews.author: Mahnoor I.
reviews.text: Big, juicy and delicious every single time. Gets packed in the evenings — go early or be ready to wait for a table.

reviews.author: Hassan R.
reviews.text: Great burgers and a nice spot inside the mall. Can get busy but well worth it.

stores.name: Brim DHA Phase 6
stores.address: Building No. 79, Ground Floor, Raya Commercial Phase 6, DHA, Lahore, Pakistan
stores.placeQuery: Brim Burgers Raya Commercial DHA Phase 6 Lahore

reviews.author: Ali Z.
reviews.text: Raya Commercial finally has a proper burger joint. Smashed thin, deeply savoury, and the fries are loaded right.

reviews.author: Fatima N.
reviews.text: My go-to in DHA. Patty-to-bun ratio is spot on and the shakes are thick. Open late too, which is a lifesaver.

stores.name: Brim Model Town
stores.address: Model Town Link Rd, adjacent to KFC, Block G, Model Town, Lahore, Pakistan
stores.placeQuery: Brim Burgers Model Town Link Road Lahore

reviews.author: Bilal K.
reviews.text: Right next to KFC and honestly leaves it in the dust. Juicy, messy, and perfectly smashed.

reviews.author: Ayesha M.
reviews.text: Really good smash burgers and friendly staff. Parking can be tricky at peak hours.

reviews.author: Hamza A.
reviews.text: Islamabad finally gets a Brim and it does not disappoint. Crispy edges, proper Halal beef, top-tier sauce.

reviews.author: Sana W.
reviews.text: Big juicy burgers exactly as advertised. Clean, modern space and quick service.
